# Kuwait

**Summary**: The secondary geographic region for the study of the Gudair and Bahrah formations.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] studied the Late Cretaceous rocks in Kuwait.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] Kuwait-Basrah area

## Formations Present

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] Gudair, Bahrah, Tayarat Formations

## Key Findings From This Location

- The area represents an intermediate shelf environment between the Arabian geosyncline and the Arabian massive. ([[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989, p. 34]])
